I like to make stuff and put it on the internet

About Me

I'm 21 years old studying Computer Science at Varsity College. I work as a freelance sailor and take on contract web work.

I love to learn new things and explore different ways of building things on the web.

I'm a part-time surf coach and live in the beautiful city of Cape Town.
